summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of SwarmOS iteration 4 - professional sales landing page with 3-tier pricing, affiliate ref tracking, and Success page. All 27 backend API tests passed. Fixed critical bug in Dashboard upgrade button. All frontend flows working correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: Upgrade button onClick was passing event object instead of plan string, causing 'Converting circular structure to JSON' error

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Resend email sending not integrated - no actual emails sent
MOCKED: Gmail inbox reading is simulated
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup: 1 demo user, 5 leads, 1 campaign
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 tested successfully. New features verified: Professional sales landing page with urgency bar (limited spots countdown), hero section with CTAs, social proof stats, video section, how-it-works cards, testimonials, 3-tier pricing (Starter $99/mo, Growth $297/mo, Lifetime $497 one-time), risk reversal (30-day guarantee), FAQ accordion, final CTA, footer. Affiliate ref tracking works (?ref=test123 passes through to /app). Success page handles session_id param correctly. Fixed upgrade button bug in Dashboard.

landing_page.urgency_bar: Limited beta: only X spots left at this price - working with countdown
landing_page.navbar: SwarmOS logo, Login link, Start Free Trial CTA - all link to /app
landing_page.hero_section: Heading, description, Start Free Trial and Watch Demo buttons - working
landing_page.video_section: Video placeholder with play button - visible at #demo
landing_page.how_it_works: 3 step cards (Tell us ICP, AI does work, Meetings on calendar) - visible

pricing_section.starter: $99/mo - 500 emails, AI generation, Reply classification, Basic analytics, Email support
pricing_section.growth: $297/mo (Most Popular) - Unlimited emails, AI sentiment, Auto booking, Advanced analytics, Priority support, Custom ICP
pricing_section.lifetime: $497 one-time (was $2,388) - Everything in Growth, Lifetime access, All updates, White-glove onboarding, Dedicated Slack

landing_page.final_cta: Ready to automate your outbound? with Start Free Trial button - links to /app
landing_page.footer: SwarmOS branding, Pricing, Demo, Affiliate Program links - visible

affiliate_ref_tracking.cta_links: All CTAs link to /app?ref=test123 when ref param present
affiliate_ref_tracking.onboarding_receives_ref: Onboarding page receives ref param in URL

onboarding_5_step_flow.step_2_target: Who do you want to target? - working
onboarding_5_step_flow.step_5_ai_preview: AI-generated email preview with Regenerate button - working
onboarding_5_step_flow.launch_button: Launch AI System redirects to /dashboard - working

dashboard.sidebar_nav: Dashboard, Outreach, Meetings, Analytics, Settings - all views working
dashboard.kpi_cards: Emails Sent, Replies, Meetings Booked, Total Leads - visible
dashboard.upgrade_button: Triggers Stripe checkout at $99/mo - FIXED and working
dashboard.logout_button: Clears localStorage and redirects to landing page - working

success_page.session_id_handling: Handles session_id param, shows error for invalid sessions

backend_apis_new.POST /api/subscribe (with ref): Stores affiliate tracking in payment_transactions - working

bug_fixed.description: Dashboard upgrade button was broken due to onClick handler passing event object instead of plan string
bug_fixed.root_cause: onClick={handleUpgrade} passes the click event as first argument, which was being used as the 'plan' parameter in axios.post, causing JSON serialization error
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed to onClick={() => handleUpgrade('starter')} to explicitly pass the plan string
